---
title: "Live: Bundibugyo Ebolavirus Evidence Surveillance"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

This page displays the current evidence surveillance table for Bundibugyo Ebolavirus.

The table is generated from the CSV file stored in this outbreak folder:

`outbreaks/bundibugyo-ebola/data/references.csv`

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

rawReferences = FileAttachment("data/references.csv").csv({typed: false})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

visibleColumns = rawReferences.length > 0
  ? Object.keys(rawReferences[0]).filter(c =>
      c &&
      c.trim() !== "" &&
      !c.startsWith("__") &&
      !c.toLowerCase().startsWith("unnamed")
    )
  : []
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

references = rawReferences.map(row =>
  Object.fromEntries(
    visibleColumns.map(column => [column, row[column]])
  )
)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

html`<div class="status-box">
<strong>${references.length}</strong> records loaded from the current CSV file.<br>
<strong>${visibleColumns.length}</strong> columns detected in this dataset.
</div>`
```

## Search the evidence

Use the search box below to search across all fields in the dataset.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

viewof searched_references = Inputs.search(
  references,
  {placeholder: "Search all fields..."}
)

```
<details class="filter-panel">
<summary><strong>Filter the evidence</strong></summary>

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

cleanValue = value =>
  value === null || value === undefined ? "" : String(value).trim()
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

filterableColumns = visibleColumns.filter(column =>
  column &&
  column.trim() !== "" &&
  !/^_+$/.test(column.trim()) &&
  column.trim() !== "__evidence"
)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

filterOptions = Object.fromEntries(
  filterableColumns.map(column => [
    column,
    ["All", ...Array.from(
      new Set(
        references
          .map(row => cleanValue(row[column]))
          .filter(value => value !== "")
      )
    ).sort()]
  ])
)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

viewof selectedFilters = Inputs.form(
  Object.fromEntries(
    filterableColumns.map(column => [
      column,
      Inputs.select(filterOptions[column], {label: column})
    ])
  )
)
```

</details>

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

filtered_references = searched_references.filter(row =>
  filterableColumns.every(column =>
    selectedFilters[column] === "All" ||
    cleanValue(row[column]) === selectedFilters[column]
  )
)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

html`<div class="status-box">
<strong>${filtered_references.length}</strong> records shown after search and filters.
</div>`
```
## Browse table

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

Inputs.table(filtered_references, {
  columns: visibleColumns,
  height: 700,
  select: false,
  format: {
    URL: value =>
      value
        ? htl.html`<a href=${value} target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">View link</a>`
        : "",

    DOI: value =>
      value
        ? htl.html`<a href=${`https://doi.org/${value}`} target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">${value}</a>`
        : ""
  }
})
```

<a href="data/references.csv" download="bundibugyo-ebola-references.csv" class="btn btn-primary">
Download CSV
</a>

::: {.status-box}
**Note:** This outbreak page uses a generic CSV viewer. Columns may differ across outbreaks depending on the evidence surveillance output.
:::
